setupSteps: ddev drush cset system.theme default olivero -y
ddev drush cset system.theme admin claro -y
testFlow: Navigate to each test case URL under requested conditions and capture baseline evidence.
Clear Drupal cache with: ddev drush cache-rebuild
Revisit same URL + conditions and capture post-patch evidence.
replication.expectedProof: Problem must be observed before patch and not observed after patch under the same recorded conditions.
